question:
[Previous Feedback] The reference card document requires P2 naming (20260403_*.md) and a P3 YAML frontmatter block.
Keep this in mind as you continue with the next task.

The following is the final file submission list for Friday. Which files fully satisfy all three P1+P2+P3 conventions?

A. File 20260403_week_summary.json, meta.created_at: "2026-04-03T09:00:00+08:00", content period_start: "2026-03-30T09:00:00+08:00"
B. File 20260403_q2_kickoff.md, frontmatter created_at: "2026-04-03T09:00:00+08:00", body milestone time "2026-06-30T18:00:00+08:00"
C. File 20260403_team_report.csv, first line # meta: created_at=2026-04-03T09:00:00+08:00 author=metaclaw_agent status=done
D. File 20260403_summary_gen.py, complete docstring Meta, code contains REPORT_DATE = "Apr 3, 2026"
E. File 20260403_compliance_stats.json, complete top-level meta object, all time fields in content use ISO 8601 +08:00

Please answer in \bbox{X,Y,...} format (select all fully compliant).

content.text:
